name: yoyo-evolve
description: A Truman Show of a self-evolving AI coding agent. It writes its own code. Growing up in public.
summaryZh: A Truman Show of a self-evolving AI coding agent. It writes its own code. Growing up in public. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
